arts.ttl: Espanyol star speaks out on Arsenal links
arts.sum: Espanyol star Joan García has on Thursday spoken out on the summer speculation linking him with a move to England, with Arsenal. The name of shot-stopper Joan of course took…

arts.ttl: Arsenal supporters less angry than Tottenham, Man City in Premier League study
arts.sum: All of this data has led to SeatPick handing out 'anger scores' to the fanbases of all 20 Premier League clubs. Arsenal supporters have been listed as one of the least angry fanbases in the Premier League, according to a recent study.

arts.ttl: Atalanta vs Arsenal LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups as Gunners begin campaign in Italy
arts.sum: The Gunners hope to kick off their campaign with a winning start

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland and Pep Guardiola disagree over dream Arsenal signing
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola and Erling Haaland have different opinions when it comes to which Arsenal star every other team in the division would want. Many fans and pundits have shared their combined starting XIs for the two teams - but City boss Guardiola has admitted that he'd have signed Rice if he wanted to come to the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta’s net worth, Miss Spain wife and new Arsenal salary after contract extension
arts.sum: Since then, Arteta has established himself as a respected figure in north London, leading Arsenal to second-place finishes in the Premier League in the last two seasons, as well as lifting the FA Cup in his first season and securing Community Shields in 2020 and 2023. He joined Pep Guardiola's coaching staff at Manchester City in 2016, where he helped the team secure two Premier League titles, two EFL Cups, two community shields and an FA Cup before leaving the club in 2019 to take up the managerial reins at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man City handed new relegation bombshell which could affect Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham
arts.sum: UEFA rules are more complex though as those state that any team with a UEFA club licence can compete in their competitions. If Manchester City are to be expelled from the Premier League they could also be booted out of the FA Cup and Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: We simulated Atalanta vs Arsenal to predict the Gunners' Champions League opener
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Nwaneri, Rice; Saka, Havertz, Sterling. Arsenal's 2024/25 Champions League campaign gets underway later today, with the Gunners making the trip to Italy to take on last season's Europa League winners Atalanta.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola offers biggest Man City future hint yet before Arsenal title race showdown
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has hinted he may look to extend his stay in England ahead of the huge title race clash with Arsenal on Sunday. However, after the goalless draw in the Champions League at home to Inter on Wednesday night, the City boss gave an impassioned speech about his love for England.

arts.ttl: Arsenal undroppable set for new role vs Man City after Erling Haaland flashpoint
arts.sum: Gabriel turned in a man-of-the-match performance against Tottenham in the North London Derby, scoring the only goal of the game and showing his immense quality at the back. Haaland already has nine Premier League goals to his name this season, scoring in every match so far.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star edges closer to exit with Gunners eyeing Liverpool target to replace him
arts.sum: Arsenal could lose of their key players next year with interest increasing in his services from the Middle East. According to Teamtalk, midfielder Thomas Partey is likely to leave the club at the end of the season.
